text: We didn’t choose hard mode. We were born into it.
They gave us pressure. We turned it into diamonds.
We heal loudly and hustle silently.
We’re not lazy — we’re exhausted from surviving.
If the system won’t hire us, we’ll build our own.
Anxiety tried to cancel me. I dropped a comeback season.
We don’t wait for opportunities. We create WiFi and connect.
They called us distracted. We were multitasking survival.
No inheritance? Cool. We’ll inherit discipline.
We grew up online but we move in real life.
Struggling isn’t embarrassing. Staying stuck is.
We romanticize nothing — we monetize everything.
Broke is temporary. Skills are permanent.
